ValidationRule.description: For all Pre-Judgment statuses (except for Action Rejected) - Following fields become mandatory and remain editable Suit Amount Case Number Court County Legal Firm Attorney Legal Agency
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL( Legal_Status__c, 'Pre-Judgment'), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Legal_Sub_Status__c, 'Action Rejected')), OR( ISBLANK( Suit_Amount__c ), ISBLANK( Case_Number__c ), ISPICKVAL(Court__c, ''), ISPICKVAL( Country__c , '' ), ISBLANK( Legal_Firm__c ), ISBLANK( Attorney__c ), ISBLANK( Legal_Agency__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please make sure Suit Amount, Case Number, Court, County, Legal Firm, Attorney, and Legal Agency are entered
